node.text: John found a new gym for training to stay on his basketball game.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "John") on John (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Strength training improved John's shooting accuracy, agility, and speed, giving him confidence on the court.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "John") on John (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "basketball training supplement") on Session 8 (Score: 0.90)
Matched atom(content =~ "supplement basketball training") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.90)

node.text: John included strength training in his workout routine to build muscle, increase power, prevent injuries, and improve agility and speed.

node.text: John is part of a basketball team which he feels lucky to be a part of.

node.text: John injured himself recently, had to miss games, and couldn't help his team.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "John") on John (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John talks about winning a b-ball game against another team that was close until the final buzzer.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "John") on John (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "supplement basketball training") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.52)

node.text: John has signed a deal with Nike for a basketball shoe and gear, and is in talks with Gatorade for a potential sponsorship.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "John") on John (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "supplement basketball training") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.88)

node.text: The signed ball from his teammates serves as a reminder of the bond and support he has from them in his basketball journey.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "John") on John (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "supplement basketball training") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.58)

node.text: John values the bond created by being around people who share the same love for basketball.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "John") on John (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John shares that he had a milestone moment at the gym where he was able to jog without pain.
